tasks.label: Start Employee Backend
tasks.command: cd backend && npm install && node server.js

tasks.label: Check mssql versions
tasks.command: cd backend && npm view mssql versions --json

tasks.label: List mssql versions
tasks.command: cd backend; npm view mssql versions --json

tasks.label: Start Backend with mssql
tasks.command: cd backend && npm install mssql@9.0.0 && node server.js
